title: I am allowed to want this
subtitle: A three-minute release-and-allow for the guilt of wanting more.
excerpt: A short pair of energy statements for the moment a real want surfaces and the guilt arrives with it. Use it when wanting something feels selfish or too much.
sourceNotes: Release / Allow structure: The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. Theme adapted from Day 15 of MONEY (Rebecca J Page, 2025), "Release guilt about wanting wealth".

practice.whenToUse: Use when a specific want has arrived (a house, an income figure, more space, more time) and the guilt of wanting it has arrived with it.

content.text: A three-minute pair of energy statements for the moment a real want surfaces and the guilt arrives with it. Use it on self-worth, money, or abundance wants.

attrs.quote: I am ready to release the belief that wanting this much is wrong. I release it now. I release it now. I release it now.
I am ready to align with and allow myself to want this fully. I allow it now. I allow it now. I allow it now.

content.text: Say each three times, slow, out loud or in your mind.
When the guilt is loud enough that the Allow doesn't land, tap first.
covers the morning version; the same pattern works for any money-adjacent worry. Tap, then return to these statements.

The release-and-allow structure is from The Money Zone (Rebecca Page, 2024), chapters 2 through 5. The theme (releasing guilt around wanting wealth) is adapted from Day 15 of MONEY (Rebecca J Page, 2025). The combination is original to the homemade.education library.
